twc_daily.narrative: Thunderstorms early. Lows overnight in the mid 60s.
A few morning showers. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the upper 60s.
Morning clouds followed by afternoon sun. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the upper 60s.
Afternoon thunderstorms. Potential for severe thunderstorms. Highs in the upper 70s and lows in the mid 60s.
Morning thunderstorms. Highs in the mid 80s and lows in the mid 60s.
Partly cloudy. Highs in the mid 80s and lows in the mid 60s.
Scattered thunderstorms. Highs in the upper 60s and lows in the mid 40s.

nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 76. South wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

Mostly cloudy, with a low around 67. South wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.
